visualizerParams.title: Champernowne's Constant
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the logic to efficiently generate Champernowne's constant and calculate the digit product.

solution.code:
def solution():
    # Efficiently build string up to 1,000,000 digits
    constant_parts = []
    length = 0
    i = 1
    while length < 1000000:
        s = str(i)
        constant_parts.append(s)
        length += len(s)
        i += 1
    
    constant = "".join(constant_parts)
    
    # dn refers to 1st, 10th... digits, so index is dn - 1
    indices = [0, 9, 99, 999, 9999, 99999, 999999]
    res = 1
    for idx in indices:
        res *= int(constant[idx])
    return res


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(solution())
